name: Dainee
overview: A woman, long detached from her roots, returns home and discovers her estranged sister on the verge of being burnt alive after being branded a witch. As the horror unfolds, the woman has to battle deep-seated superstitions and sinister forces in a desperate crusade for survival and justice.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Dainee (ডাইনি) | Mimi Chakraborty | Nirjhar Mitra | 14 Mar | hoichoi
